name: codex-claude-delegate
description: Codex supervises and reviews; Claude Code implements all code changes

interface.shortDescription: Codex plans and reviews; Claude Code writes code
interface.longDescription: Automated build loop where Codex handles planning, supervision, and review while Claude Code performs all implementation work.
defaultPrompt: Use @build-loop to implement a feature with Codex supervising and Claude Code writing the code.
Use @cancel-build-loop to abort an active delegate loop.
